commands.review_summary:
The PR carries a remaining Codex app-server startup deadline into the shared/isolated client factory, times out `client.initialize()` before `thread/start`, stops retrying after startup abandonment, and adds Codex startup plus isolated cron regression tests.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +513. Total +548 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Not for the full reporter-account OAuth cron setup in this review; the narrowed failure boundary is source-reproducible and covered by deterministic PR tests that stall Codex `initialize` before `thread/start`.
